parsed.clarification_question: What should I prioritize for this paragraph: (A) sentence-level writing polish and readability, (B) checking the mathematical/logical consistency of the curvature argument and related claims, or (C) assessing whether the empirical results align with the stated theoretical narrative?

rationale.R1.2: The paragraph advances a theoretical argument about curvature and greedy performance, so verifying the internal logical and mathematical consistency is a central responsibility.
rationale.R1.3: Because the text presents empirical ratios alongside a theoretical narrative, assessing whether the reported numbers support the stated claims is central.
rationale.R1.6: A request to ‘take a look at this paragraph’ commonly entails sentence-level clarity and fluency improvements, making writing polish a central expectation.
rationale.RX.1: Ambiguity in the request requires clearly stating uncertainties about intended focus and any limits of inference.
rationale.RX.2: To avoid overclaiming, any responsibility projection will refrain from asserting conclusions beyond what the paragraph itself supports.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence ensures the work remains confined to this specific paragraph and the responsibilities selected by the user.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance guides caution against introducing misleading interpretations of technical claims.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability require tying any observations or checks directly to the provided text and its cited results.
